rationale: Build on the current best late projection-EMA finalizer, but pivot the actual change to the int8 quantizer. Projection matrices now use grouped per-row scales during both roundtrip-aware training and final serialization, which should lower quantization distortion on the most sensitive tensors while staying comfortably under the 16MB cap. This spends artifact budget on a new quantizer-resolution idea instead of another small EMA scheduling replay.
title: Projection Group-Scale EMA Finalizer
